0035CF27461202CE8A4E549ACA8DDCF5: "A mountain is not immovable, it just moves at its own pace." - Ancient Spinjitzu Proverb
25B38C394F82FDBA591687B62EC6EC15: "Long before us, long after us, the patient rock remains." - Ancient Spinjitzu Proverb
FDAC3E14453BC50A28DC7D9E44048A13: "No matter our differences, we all have the same earth beneath our feet." - Ancient Spinjitzu Proverb
932095334A97EA654741CEBCDD2A05F6:
Add to a weapon's Relic Slot while crafting to deal ELEMENTAL EARTH damage and use the Geokinesis ability. Strong against LIGHTNING.

Geokinesis - Charge your weapon by dealing damage. When fully charged, use <keybind touch_img="Geokinesis">Target</> to create a wall of defensive EARTH.

34BFF0B84BBC83FD20F4B6A41D0F0637:
Add to a weapon's Relic Slot while crafting to deal ELEMENTAL EARTH damage and use the Tecto-Tunneling ability. Strong against LIGHTNING.

Increase ELEMENTAL EARTH damage.

Tecto-tunneling - Charge your weapon by dealing damage. When fully charged, use <keybind touch_img="TectoTunneling">Target</> to swiftly tunnel into the EARTH. Attack while underground to explode to the surface and deal ELEMENTAL EARTH damage, before diving back into the ground.
